name: Orange Cube Minute Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the egg into a bowl and blend in 3 tablespoons of sugar.
2. In a separate measuring cup, add the grated orange peel and fill to the 1/4 cup mark with orange juice. Add enough milk to make 1 cup.
3. Mix and stir quickly until just blended. The batter will be lumpy.
4. Fill muffin cups that have been rubbed well with shortening about halfway full.
5. On top of each unbaked muffin, press a cube of sugar dipped into orange juice.
6. Bake in a 425°F oven for about 15 minutes.
